name: vibe-insights
description: Vibe Insights — the deep retrospective for your Claude Code work. Coverage, where-was-I recall, token/cost (incl. the cache reveal), trends, how-you-work, ranked open threads, decisions, languages, per-session friction/satisfaction/outcome, and a synthesized narrative read. Across your full history and every machine you code on. Personal by default; optionally keep chosen sources or repos local-only. No telemetry, all local. MCP-agnostic decisions overlay.
